comment: All gameplay tuning lives here (CLAUDE.md §4: data-driven balance). Reloaded at boot; no code changes needed to rebalance.

enemy.comment_min_wave: Pacing floor (GAME-time seconds, i.e. at 1x speed). A normal wave never clears faster than this no matter how hard the party out-DPSes the pool, so every wave is a visible fight and the per_wave minions march in and die over the minimum. 5 waves x 12s = 60s/sub-stage at 1x = 30s/sub-stage at the default 2x speed; 4x = 15s. simulate_offline floors wave time at the same value so away-gains match the live sim exactly. Boss waves are exempt (already long via boss_hp_mult + boss kit timing).
enemy.comment_floors: stages_per_act (50) is FROZEN — it is the global stage-index multiplier read by the server (caps/leaderboard/chests). substages_per_floor groups the flat 1..50 stage counter into floors for boss cadence (10 substages = 1 floor → 5 floors per act). Mini-boss on the final wave of substage 5, floor boss on the final wave of substage 10.

heroes.comment: Base DPS per collection hero (GameContent.HEROES ids) before multipliers. Non-default heroes scaled off the design's roster power ratios.

roster.comment: Each gacha-summoned hero adds flat support DPS by rarity.

character.comment: Single-character base DPS per class (1 account = 1 character). Calibrated so a SOLO player ≈ the old optimal 4-hero party (default heroes summed ~3.4M base × 1.18 team aura ≈ 4.0M). The real-party composition aura (party_aura_mult, server-side) multiplies on top when partied. 'default' covers an unset class_id.

dps_model.comment: party_dps = character.base_dps[class] * (1 + all_damage + half_coef*(melee+spell+fire+attack_speed)) * party_aura_mult * level_growth^(player_level - level_ref).
dps_model.level_comment: DPS scales with character level. level_ref is the calibration anchor (the old demo character): at that level the multiplier is 1.0 so base_dps keeps its demo-tuned value and the deep-floor curve is unchanged. A fresh level-1 delver is intentionally weak for floor 1-1 (its tiny wave pool would otherwise vanish in one tick); power grows ~1.22x/level so the party levels into the deeper floors instead of out-running them.

composition.comment: Real-party composition aura (mirror of the server's compositionAura.ts). party_aura_mult = 1 + min(cap, size_step*(online-1) + class_step*(distinctClasses-1) + role_step*(distinctRoles-1)). Used in mock mode; live mode reads party_aura_mult straight off the server PartyView.

derived_bases.comment: Baseline derived stats before gear/talent/pet/relic contributions.

power.comment: Total Power = dps*dps_w + life*life_w + armour*armour_w + attr_sum*attr_w + gear_power. Calibrated so the default loadout lands near the design's 142,860 / 88,420.
